[{'text': "All sectors are CLEAR. From the map, I can see:
- The robot (RED dot) is in a horizontal corridor, facing right (+X direction, yaw ~0°)
- The destination (GREEN circle) is to the upper-right — I need to go right (+X) and up (+Y)
- There are horizontal black walls/obstacles above and below the current corridor

The destination is at (11.51, 13.67) and I'm at (3.98, 7.87). I need to move right (+X) and up (+Y). The robot is currently facing right (east). Let me move forward (east) first to get closer to the destination's X coordinate.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01Ay1pr9niqXn68CjUhXNncE', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 1.0}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
